strategy.name: CoinsKid RSI 4H Trigger Strategy
sources: CoinsKid (@CoinsKid, 271K subscribers) — synthesised from 40 videos Sep 2025–Jun 2026
strategy.description: Setup A from CoinsKid's playbook: RSI(14) on the 4H chart hitting 13.5 is a high-probability bounce signal. Confirmed repeatedly across XRP and BTC. Macro regime check (20-week EMA) filters out buying in structural downtrends. Long-only — spot trading on Coinbase Advanced.

indicators.rsi_14: Primary trigger. RSI(14) on 4H ≤ 13.5 = high-probability bounce setup. CoinsKid: 'Drop an alert at 13.5 on the RSI on the 4-hourly time frame. You see it come down to that, you buy.'
indicators.ema_20w: Macro regime filter. 20-week EMA (~840 four-hour candles). Above = bull market mode, all setups active. Below = caution, short-term scalps only.
indicators.vwap: Session bias reference. Informational — used for context, not a hard block.

bullish: RSI(14) on 4H has dropped to or below 13.5
Price is not more than 30% below the 20-week EMA (no extreme crash)
bias_criteria.note: Long-only strategy — spot trading on Coinbase Advanced. No short positions.

long: RSI(14) on 4H ≤ 13.5 — CoinsKid's primary bounce trigger
Price is within 30% of the 20-week EMA — macro regime is not in structural collapse
Spot only — no leverage, no margin

exit_rules: Target: daily ribbon (daily EMA cluster) — first take-profit zone per CoinsKid
Hard stop: below the most recent swing low on the 4H chart
If RSI(14) crosses back above 50, begin scaling out
risk_rules: Risk maximum 1-2% of portfolio per trade
Maximum trade size capped by MAX_TRADE_SIZE_USD in .env
Maximum trades per day capped by MAX_TRADES_PER_DAY in .env
Always check BTC health (20-week EMA position) before any trade
Never buy a coin showing in the Macro Index sell zone on coinskid.com
If bottom checklist (coinskid.com) shows 0-2 triggers: sidelines or extreme caution
If bottom checklist shows 5+ triggers: high-conviction, normal size
macro_pre_checks: Bitcoin above or below 20-week EMA? Above = bull mode (all setups). Below = scalps only.
Tether Dominance (USDT.D on TradingView): rising = money leaving crypto (caution); falling = money entering (look for longs)
Market breadth green? Green = altcoin longs viable. Red = BTC only.
Check coinskid.com BMS Index: coins 30%+ above BMS = short candidates; 60%+ below = buy candidates
notes: Primary setup is CoinsKid's Setup A: RSI(14) 4H trigger at 13.5. Most reliable and highest frequency setup from his 40-video transcript analysis. Target is always the daily ribbon. Stop always below the swing low. CoinsKid uses this on XRP and BTC specifically. Custom platform signals (coinskid.com BMS Index, Futures Blocks, Crypto Radar, Liquidity Dance) cannot be automated — use them manually for pre-session context before trusting the bot's output.
